Our Story

Made With Love
For the Best Moments

Vaughn Sweetz is a boutique home bakery dedicated to creating beautifully crafted, deeply delicious cupcakes and desserts for every occasion — from intimate gatherings to grand celebrations.

Every treat is handcrafted fresh to order, with premium ingredients and an eye for detail that makes each bite unforgettable. Whether it's a birthday, graduation, Father's Day, or just because — we bring the sweetz to your celebration.

The Sweetz Collection

Classic Cupcakes
Our signature handcrafted cupcakes in a variety of flavors — red velvet, vanilla, chocolate, and seasonal specials — topped with gorgeous swirled frosting.
